name: drkpxl-skills
description: Installable skills for AI agents, by drkpxl. Copywriting, ADHD-friendly output shaping, and real-time US air quality.

plugins.name: copywriting
plugins.description: Conversion copywriting for website pages (homepage, landing, pricing, feature, about). Finds where the copy lives and edits it in place.

plugins.name: i-have-adhd
plugins.description: Shape output for an ADHD reader: lead with the next action, number steps, restate state, suppress tangents, make wins visible. Forked from ayghri/i-have-adhd.

plugins.name: tiny-air
plugins.description: Real-time US air quality (AQI) via a hosted MCP server. Ask about smoke, set proactive alerts, or query by ZIP / city / coordinates.
